title: External review status for the current public-review stack
purpose: Represent the current external-review status as a machine-checkable non-activation surface: external review acceptance remains an active release blocker, substantive feedback is not acceptance, and no independent reviewer has confirmed the claimed result.

did not validate or reject the claim

nonClaims: This external-review status manifest does not activate public theorem emission.

This external-review status manifest treats outreach and substantive feedback as review metadata, not proof evidence.
